# The Nolana Report
> Weekly business intelligence briefing for the Rio Grande Valley, Texas

## About
The Nolana Report is published every Monday by National Bookkeeping Company (nationalboco.com). It covers new business openings, government and economic policy, cross-border trade with Mexico, community events, and industrial investment across McAllen, Edinburg, Brownsville, Pharr, Harlingen, Mission, and the entire Rio Grande Valley.

## Coverage Areas
- New Business Pulse: openings, expansions, closings, LLC filings
- Gov & Economic Watch: permits, grants, zoning, city council decisions
- Cross-Border & Trade: USD/MXN rates, bridge wait times, tariffs, customs
- Community Buzz: events, social signals, local TV coverage
- Industrial & Investment Watch: manufacturing, corporate relocations, FTZ activity, EDC announcements

## Data
- Sources: 25+ including KRGV, ValleyCentral, RGV Business Journal, The Monitor, Brownsville Herald, Rio Grande Guardian, Texas Border Business, Valley Business Report, Federal Register, CBP, Edinburg EDC, McAllen EDC, Port of Brownsville
- Every story is scored 0-100 for relevance to RGV business owners
- Coverage area: Hidalgo County, Cameron County, Starr County, Willacy County

## Pricing
- Free: weekly summary email + live data bar
- Pro: $9/month (founding members $7/month locked forever) — full 30-story briefing, score badges, archive
- Intel: $19/month — Pro + monthly deep-dive industry analysis

## Contact
- Website: https://nolanareport.com
- Publisher: National Bookkeeping Company, 315 W Nolana Ave, McAllen, TX 78504
- Parent site: https://nationalboco.com
